title: ctenitis kusukusensis
intro: Ctenitis kusukusensis, also known as the Kusuku fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis kusukusensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Ctenitis kusukusensis is often combined with other plants to make teas, infusions, and decoctions for various health applications.
